name: Tri- Bean Bake
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup apple juice, frozen concentrate, defrosted
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375 degrees.
2. In a 10-inch skillet, combine onion and celery. Cook in water over medium heat until vegetables are tender, stirring occasionally.
3. Remove from heat.
4. Stir in remaining ingredients.
5. Spoon mixture into 1-quart casserole.
6. Cover and bake for 25 to 30 minutes, or until hot and bubbly.
